Door.Access.Command

接口 INCommand

  • 所有超级接口:
    INCommandRuntime
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractCommand, AddTimeGroup, BeginWatch, BeginWatch_Broadcast, ClearCardDataBase, ClearPasswordDateBase, ClearTimeGroup, ClearTransactionDatabase, CloseAlarm, CloseDoor, CloseFireAlarm, WriteLockInteraction, WriteOpenAlarmOption, WriteOvertimeAlarmSetting, WritePassword, WritePassword, WritePushButtonSetting, WriteReadCardSpeak, WriteReaderCheckMode, WriteReaderInterval, WriteReaderIntervalTime, WriteReaderOption, WriteReaderWorkSetting, WriteRecordMode, WriteRelayOption, WriteRelayReleaseTime, WriteSensorAlarmSetting, WriteSmogAlarmOption, WriteSN, WriteSN_Broadcast, WriteTCPSetting, WriteTheftAlarmSetting, WriteTime, WriteTimeBroadcast, WriteTimeDefine, WriteTransactionDatabaseReadIndex, WriteTransactionDatabaseWriteIndex

    public interface INCommand
extends INCommandRuntime
    所有命令的抽象接口，一个命令包含一个或多个 INPacket

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      INCommandParameter getCommandParameter()
      包含此命令的参数
      INCommandResult getCommandResult()
      命令返回结果
      boolean getIsTimeout()
      获取此命令是否已超时
      int getProcessMax()
      总步骤数
      int getProcessStep()
      当前指令进度
      int getSendCount()
      获取命令发送次数
      void setCommandParameter(INCommandParameter par)
      设置此命令相关参数

      • 从接口继承的方法 Door.Access.Command.INCommandRuntime

        CheckResponse, CheckTimeout, GetIdentity, getIsCommandOver, getIsWaitResponse, GetPacket, GetStatus, RaiseCommandCompleteEvent, RaiseCommandProcessEvent, Release, SendCommand

    • 方法详细资料

      • getProcessMax

        int getProcessMax()
        总步骤数
        返回:

      • getProcessStep

        int getProcessStep()
        当前指令进度
        返回:

      • getSendCount

        int getSendCount()
        获取命令发送次数
        返回:
        每发一次就+1

      • getIsTimeout

        boolean getIsTimeout()
        获取此命令是否已超时
        返回:
        true表示已超时

      • getCommandParameter

        INCommandParameter getCommandParameter()
        包含此命令的参数
        返回:
        命令参数

      • setCommandParameter

        void setCommandParameter(INCommandParameter par)
        设置此命令相关参数
        参数:
        par - 命令参数

      • getCommandResult

        INCommandResult getCommandResult()
        命令返回结果
        返回:
        包含结果结构体
